creator: Jess Hawkins
source_text:
TIRED GIRL DINNERS: episode 6 🫶🏻

Sweet Chilli Chicken Toastie 🤍

I fully stand by the fact that a sandwich is a perfect dinner choice, especially a tired girl dinner, and this cheesy sweet chilli chicken melt is one of my favourites 😍

It’s packed full of protein from the chicken, has the creaminess of mayo, kick of sweet chilli and the melt of two types of cheese…👀

It’s just SO good, and ready in less than 15 minutes! The filling preps really well too, so make it ahead and it’s even easier 👏🏼 

📌 Also don’t forget to give it a save for days you need a tired girl dinner 👀

📍 Serves Two
📍 568 calories and 48.5g of protein

200g of cooked chicken breast, diced
40g light mayo
40g reduced sugar sweet chilli sauce
198g tinned sweetcorn, drained
2 spring onions, finely sliced
40g cheddar, sliced
40g mozzarella, grated
4 slices of white bread
1 tsp garlic granules

Add your chicken, mayo, sweet chilli sauce, sweetcorn, spring onions, mozzarella and garlic granules to a bowl along with a good pinch of salt and pepper, and mix until fully combined.

Place half of the mix onto one slice of the bread, then add 20g of cheddar, before topping with another slice of bread. Repeat with the remaining mix and bread. 

Spray a large frying pan generously with oil spray, then spray each side of the Toastie, and cook over a medium heat for a few minutes on each side until the bread is crispy and golden. Don’t have the heat too high or you’ll burn the bread before the cheese inside melts. 

Then that’s literally it! Simply serve on it’s own, or with some oven chips, and enjoy.

#toastie #easydinner #quickrecipes #sweetchilli #lowcalorierecipes
